title: little squids
description: changes both squid's and glow squid's models to look cuter
body:
<center>
replaces both squid's and glow squid's model for an alternative, cuter one
  
<sup>requires .cem compatible mod to work</sup>

![view for all the squids alternative looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZxVhRiML/images/a335f12111f6accbb28476cca9e3ae783c2efa2e.png)

pack also gives every squid 7 alternative looks, besides the default one
</center>
